facilities.name: NNPC Towers (Corporate Headquarters)
facilities.location: Herbert Macaulay Way, Central Business District, Abuja

facilities.name: NEPL OML 111 — Oredo Field
facilities.location: Oredo, Edo State (NNPC Exploration & Production Ltd)

locations.name: Tower B — Basement B2 Car Park

workTypeRules.label: Hot Work (Welding / Cutting / Grinding)
environmentalRequirements: Fire blanket & extinguisher at point of work

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Isolate and screen the work area, position fire watch
jsaTemplate.controls: Erect fire-retardant screens; remove combustibles within 10m; fire watch with extinguisher

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Carry out welding / cutting / grinding activity
jsaTemplate.risks: Eye injury, burns, inhalation of fumes
jsaTemplate.controls: Full welding PPE; local exhaust ventilation; only certified welders

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Post-work fire watch (minimum 30 minutes)
jsaTemplate.controls: Maintain fire watch 30 min after completion; final area inspection

workTypeRules.label: Confined Space Entry
environmentalRequirements: Standby rescue team at entry point

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Isolate, drain, purge and ventilate the vessel/space
jsaTemplate.controls: Positive isolation with blinds; purge and force-ventilate; verify LEL/O2/H2S before entry

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Gas test and authorise entry
jsaTemplate.controls: Authorised gas tester certifies atmosphere; continuous monitoring; entry log maintained

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Execute work inside the confined space
jsaTemplate.controls: Standby man at manway; lifeline & harness; rotation of personnel; rescue tripod rigged

workTypeRules.label: Electrical Work (LV/HV)
environmentalRequirements: Danger tags on all isolation points

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Identify circuits and apply LOTO isolation
jsaTemplate.controls: Isolate at source; lock-out tag-out; prove dead with tested voltage detector

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Carry out electrical repair / installation
jsaTemplate.controls: Insulated tools; rubber matting; permit-controlled re-energisation only

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Test, remove locks and restore supply
jsaTemplate.controls: Head-count before de-isolation; staged re-energisation; final function test

workTypeRules.label: Work at Height (>1.8m)
requiredPPE: Full body harness with double lanyard
environmentalRequirements: Drop zone barricaded below work area

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Erect / inspect access (scaffold, MEWP or ladder)
jsaTemplate.controls: Green-tagged scaffold only; competent person inspection; MEWP daily checks

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Carry out the task at height with 100% tie-off
jsaTemplate.controls: Double lanyard 100% tie-off; tool lanyards; barricade & sign drop zone

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Lower tools & materials and demobilise access
jsaTemplate.controls: Controlled lowering with rope & bucket; exclusion zone until demob complete

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Scan and mark buried services before digging
jsaTemplate.controls: Service drawings reviewed; cable avoidance tool scan; hand-dig trial pits near services

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Excavate and support the trench
jsaTemplate.controls: Batter or shore sides >1.2m; ladder access every 7.5m; barricade perimeter

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Backfill and reinstate the area
jsaTemplate.controls: Compact backfill in layers; remove barricades only after reinstatement

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Prepare work area and inspect tools
jsaTemplate.controls: Pre-use tool inspection; clear walkways; waste segregation

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Carry out maintenance activity
jsaTemplate.controls: Correct lifting technique; two-man lift >25kg; gloves worn

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Position and set up the crane
jsaTemplate.controls: Ground bearing assessment; outrigger mats; maintain clearance from OH lines

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Rig the load and perform trial lift
jsaTemplate.controls: Certified slings & shackles; tag lines; trial lift 300mm hold-point

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Execute lift and land the load
jsaTemplate.controls: Exclusion zone enforced; banksman sole signaller; no man under load

workTypeRules.label: Radiography (NDT)
environmentalRequirements: Controlled area barriers at 7.5 µSv/h boundary

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Cordon controlled area and post radiation signage
jsaTemplate.controls: Survey meter verification of barrier distance; warning lights & signage; area cleared

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Expose source and take radiographs
jsaTemplate.controls: Certified radiographers only; source tracking log; emergency retrieval kit on site

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Return source and survey clearance
jsaTemplate.controls: Survey confirm source secured in container; barriers removed only after RSO clearance

workTypeRules.label: Chemical Handling & Transfer
environmentalRequirements: Spill kit at point of work

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Review SDS and prepare transfer equipment
jsaTemplate.controls: SDS review in toolbox talk; verify labels; earthing/bonding for flammables

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Transfer / handle chemicals
jsaTemplate.controls: Splash PPE; transfer pumps with dry-break couplings; work upwind

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Dispose of waste and decontaminate
jsaTemplate.controls: Waste to licensed stream; decontamination station; spill kit replenished

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Isolate the unit (electrical & mechanical) and apply LOTO
jsaTemplate.controls: LOTO on breaker & fuel supply; prove dead; release stored pressure

jsaTemplate.jobStep: Service the generator / HVAC unit
jsaTemplate.controls: Allow cool-down; drip trays; ventilate plant room; hot surface gloves

jsaTemplate.jobStep: De-isolate, test-run and reinstate
jsaTemplate.controls: Guards refitted before de-isolation; test-run observed; log readings

jsas.jobDescription: Quarterly service of Generator No. 2 (1250 kVA) — oil change, filter replacement and load bank test

rows.jobStep: Isolate the unit (electrical & mechanical) and apply LOTO
rows.controls: LOTO on breaker & fuel supply; prove dead; release stored pressure

rows.jobStep: Service the generator / HVAC unit
rows.controls: Allow cool-down; drip trays; ventilate plant room; hot surface gloves

rows.jobStep: De-isolate, test-run and reinstate
rows.controls: Guards refitted before de-isolation; test-run observed; log readings

jsas.stopWorkConditions: Gas alarm activation; weather deterioration (lightning/high wind); loss of communication; any unplanned release; emergency siren.
